azareths-wrath.name: Azareth's Wrath
azareths-wrath.description: The demon prince's personal weapon, reforged in the closing portal. It burns with the fury of a failed invasion.

vytharas-all-seeing-eye.name: Vythara's All-Seeing Eye
vytharas-all-seeing-eye.description: The oracle's eye, crystallized and set in a pendant. It shows all possible futures simultaneously.

shadowflame-leathers.name: Shadowflame Leathers
shadowflame-leathers.description: Armor woven from shadow and flame. The wearer flickers between visibility states.

sanctified-bulwark.name: Sanctified Bulwark
sanctified-bulwark.description: A shield consecrated in the destruction of the Infernal Sanctum. It radiates anti-demonic power.

hellgate-bow.name: Hellgate Bow
hellgate-bow.description: A bow strung with demon sinew, carved from the Infernal Gateway's frame. Arrows fired from it carry portal energy.
